capstones.name: Capstone 1: production-grade monolithic Web API
contents: Serilog structured logging + correlation ID + health checks

capstones.name: Capstone 2: modular monolith with real data layer
contents: Versioned API + keyset pagination + ETag/If-Match + Idempotency-Key
EF Core N+1 + projection + AsSplitQuery + keyset + xmin concurrency
Tenant resolution + EF10 named filters + write protection

capstones.name: Capstone 3: multi-service system
capstones.milestone: distributed system with observability and deployment
contents: Gateway + Catalog + Enrollment + Notices independent processes
gRPC unary + server streaming internal communication
YARP gateway + JWT verification + internal identity headers
Multi-stage Dockerfile + non-root chiseled + K8s + ACA + Aspire publish
